response.overview: Singh and Sinha are two soulmates sharing a blissful, inseparable bond for a year and a half. Their happiness abruptly shatters when one partner suddenly passes away, leaving the survivor trapped in overwhelming grief. The tragedy deepens when the protagonist discovers the cause of death: complications from AIDS. Shortly after, his own medical tests confirm that he is also HIV positive. Confronted with mortality and isolation, he undergoes a painful emotional journey. The narrative transforms absolute loss into a testament to human strength, showing his struggle to find hope, heal, and rebuild his life despite the illness.
response.title: Singh & Sinha
